creator: asomers@FreeBSD.org
text: 7.5, mein gott!  I've never seen any fuse file systems that use protocols earlier than 7.8.  Are you sure that FUSE_CREATE is broken for protocol 7.8?  There is a regression test for that.  So does it actually work on 7.8, or is the regression test incomplete?  Would you mind taking a look?  The test is in tests/sys/fs/fusefs/create.cc, and it's named "Create_7_8".
